metadata.methodology: Early diagnosis percentage (stages 1 and 2 combined) from National Cancer Registration and Analysis Service (NCRAS) stage at diagnosis data. 62-day compliance = proportion of cancer patients beginning first treatment within 62 days of urgent GP referral. Target 85%. Data covers England.
knownIssues: Stage at diagnosis data lags by approximately 18 months due to registration processes
Approximately 15-20% of cancers still have unknown stage at diagnosis, affecting the early diagnosis percentage
62-day target compliance affected significantly by pandemic in 2020-2021; recovery has been slow
Faster Diagnosis Standard (28-day) introduced 2020 as a new metric; historical data limited
